basicInfo.name: Nightmare Karma
basicInfo.flavor: As the once-benevolent emperor began to change after meeting Bai Jiao, Karma tried to leave the palace. However, fearing that Rin would fall victim to Bai Jiao, he chose to stay.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 100% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Burn. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 100% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Infernal Redemption
Skill 1.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals Piercing damage equal to 32% of Magic Attack 3 time(s).
 - Each attack has a 100% chance to inflict Burn. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - Deals additional damage equal to 900% of Magic Attack against targets inflicted with [Burn].
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 32% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Agonizing Tempest
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 38% of Magic Attack 3 time(s).
 - Each attack has a 100% chance to inflict Burn. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - Deals additional damage equal to 900% of Magic Attack against targets inflicted with [Burn].
 - 3 Allies
 - Heals HP equal to 7% of the caster's Max HP.
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 38% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Fallen Sage
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants Block Rate Boost. [Always Active]
 - All Allies
 - Grants All Damage Nullification. [Ends After: Taking 5 Hit(s)]
 - Grants All Damage Nullification upon using a skill 2 time(s). [Ends After: Taking 5 Hit(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Effect: Block Rate Boost to 27%.

profile.story: Karma was born in a small village beneath Sage Peak. Even as a kid, he was big and strong, and quickly became a neighborhood bully. As he grew older, he had no qualms about using his strength to dominate others. When the War of Destruction broke out, his power stood out even more. He caught the eye of the Emperor and rose through the ranks to become a general. He had no hesitation about conscripting villagers or exploiting the people beneath him. The Emperor, impressed by his boldness and results, named him the Emperor's First Sword. However one day, while his soldiers were pillaging a small village, Karma caught sight of an elderly couple who reminded him of his own parents. In that moment, he realized he was no different from the monsters he fought and felt a deep sense of disillusionment. The path he'd walked left nothing behind but ruin. Karma disbanded his troops and pledged his loyalty to Pascal, a descendant of the royal bloodline who had the support of the people. Believing it was the first step toward redemption, Karma helped Pascal unite the continent. But the process only caused more bloodshed and even greater loss. The only thing that kept Karma from breaking under the weight of it all was Rin. She was just a child when Karma rescued her from the battlefield, but she took his blood-stained hand. She didn't see a monster or a warrior, only a broken human. Karma swore he would help Rin claim her place in the royal court.
